message:
🐛 Fix missing useRef import in LLMdFlow + KVCacheMonitor loop guard

- Add useRef to LLMdFlow.tsx import (was used but not imported after
  previous commit added ref guard)
- Add ref guard to KVCacheMonitor effect with unstable generateStats dep

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  *
  * Now supports live data from selected llm-d stack via StackContext.
  */
-import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react'
+import { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react'
 import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'
 import { CircleDot } from 'lucide-react'
 import { generateServerMetrics, type ServerMetrics } from '../../../lib/llmd/mockData'
